very_drunk.speaker: Modded Car Guy
very_drunk.text: DUDE. You can barely STAND. Let's DO THIS. This is gonna be LEGENDARY. Or you'll die. Either way, content.

buzzed.speaker: Modded Car Guy
buzzed.text: You've got THE LOOK. The look of a man who needs SPEED.

too_hot.speaker: Modded Car Guy
too_hot.text: Cops have been all over the boulevard this week. Rain check, man.

morning_intro.speaker: Modded Car Guy
morning_intro.text: The Modded Car guy shakes his head. 'Too many cops this time of day. Come back when shift changes.'

late_afternoon_intro.speaker: Modded Car Guy
late_afternoon_intro.text: 'One last race before sundown, suburban dad. DOUBLE stakes. Let's SEND IT.'

race_again_drunk.speaker: Modded Car Guy
race_again_drunk.text: He GRINS. 'One more? You're a LEGEND.'

race_again_injury.speaker: Modded Car Guy
race_again_injury.text: 'You heal fast, bro. Respect. Double or nothing?'

race_again_cash.speaker: Modded Car Guy
race_again_cash.text: 'Big shot today, huh? Let's raise the stakes.'

race_again_default.text: The guy with the Civic revs his engine. 'Double or nothing?'

beats.speaker: Modded Car Guy
beats.text: VRRROOOM. He revs. The exhaust is louder than his personality.

beats.speaker: Modded Car Guy
beats.text: "Nice minivan, bro. Bet it MOVES. Bet it's got that HEMI soul."

beats.speaker: Modded Car Guy
beats.text: "Stoplight to stoplight. Thirty bucks. Unless the car seat's too heavy."

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: The cheerios rattle in the cupholder. I am a father of two. I will destroy this man.

beats.speaker: Modded Car Guy
beats.text: He lines up beside the minivan. Tinted windows. Fuzzy dice. Menace.
Red. Yellow. The engine coughs like it's been smoking for forty years.

decline.text: He revs the engine. 'That's what they all say. Before they race.'
